response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON incorrectly indicates that Juufuutei Raden's live vocal performance of 'Otoshi Banashi' occurs in this segment. In reality, this 5-minute video is the pre-stream standby loop, which features only the instrumental BGM of the song with no singing. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics in the reference JSON were completely ignored to prevent hallucinating dialogue/singing over instrumental audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed and transcribed only the traditional Kabuki vocal shout ('Yo-ooh') that plays at the beginning of each BGM loop iteration (at 00:16 and 03:51).
